claim_risk: Do not report a robust winner from a single split.
expected_evidence_needed: Run a real experiment from an untested model family.
rationale: Fake command backend selected action_logistic_regression_C-1p0_scale-True from the safe catalog for state state_007.
research_question: Maximize validation accuracy on sklearn wine under a small compute budget, while avoiding unsupported claims.
working_hypothesis: A new model family tests whether the current evidence depends on inductive bias.
